meta.title: EsperantAI — The first native gestural control category for streaming
meta.description: EsperantAI turns facial and hand gestures into streaming actions. Native integration with OBS, Streamlabs, vMix, PRISM, XSplit. Twitch/YouTube/Kick/Trovo triggers. 100% local.
meta.og_title: EsperantAI — Native gestural control for streaming
meta.og_description: Turn facial gestures into streaming actions. Integrates with OBS, Streamlabs, vMix, PRISM, XSplit. Twitch/YouTube/Kick/Trovo triggers. 100% local.
meta.twitter_title: EsperantAI — Native gestural control for streaming
meta.twitter_description: Turn facial gestures into streaming actions. 100% local. Integrates with OBS, Streamlabs, vMix, PRISM, XSplit.

a11y.demo_video_label: Extended EsperantAI demo with full setup

hero.sub: EsperantAI reads your face and hands to trigger scenes, overlays and alerts in your streaming software. Your webcam is the interface. Your gestures are the commands. Your live rhythm, intact.
hero.fineprint: Instant activation · 3 devices · On-device processing · Updates included

trust.label: Native integration with your current stack

how.h2_main: From webcam to stream control in
how.sub: No heavy installation, no learning curve. Your first session is ready in under 5 minutes.
how.step1_desc: EsperantAI detects your camera automatically. Works with any USB 1080p webcam or your laptop's built-in cam.
how.step2_desc: Guided wizard: smile, nod, give a thumbs-up. EsperantAI learns your ranges in 90 seconds.
how.step3_desc: Connect OBS via WebSocket, map gestures to scenes and sounds, and start your stream. Every gesture is a choreographed action.

features.h2_line_2_grad: Stream with your face and hands.
features.sub: Switch scenes, fire a sound, activate an overlay, or respond to a sub — without touching a thing live.
features.bento_face_desc: A smile, a head turn, or a glance fires a scene change, an alert, or a transition stinger. Zero keystrokes live.
features.bento_sw_desc: 5 software supported natively via WebSocket. No plugins, no reconfiguring anything.
features.bento_money_desc: Subs, bits, and donations trigger subtle visual thank-yous. Gratitude, not guilt-trip.
features.bento_chain_desc: Chain a scene change + sound + overlay + DM into a single trigger. Your reactions look choreographed, not manual.
features.bento_lang_desc: Auto-detects your system locale. One-click manual switch.
features.bento_privacy_title: Your face never leaves your device
features.bento_privacy_desc: AI models run on your GPU. Zero video uploaded. Zero external telemetry.

universal.lead: Facial expressions are pre-linguistic: a smile means the same thing in Tokyo, Lagos, or Bogotá. EsperantAI maps that universal language to actions, while the interface adapts to 13 languages.
universal.quote: "Facial expressions are universal across all human cultures."
universal.quote_cite_work: Universals and Cultural Differences in Facial Expressions of Emotion

compat.sub: No lock-in, no extra hardware. Your current setup stays your setup.

story.quote_cite: — in Esperanto: "Multiply your streams with gestures."
story.para_1_html: Esperanto was a human attempt to create a universal language in 1887. It failed as a spoken language, but the ideal lives on. Gestures, however, truly are universal: pre-linguistic, biological, millions of years of shared evolution.
story.para_2_html: EsperantAI is the artificial intelligence that finally speaks the only language all humans share. That's why every gesture is tagged as Universal (smile, nod, gaze) or Cultural (thumbs-up, OK, peace) — you decide which ones to use based on your global audience.

demo.sub: OBS setup, gesture calibration, combo triggers in action, and multi-action per gesture.

pricing.sub: No free tier, no trial. Secure payment via LemonSqueezy. Instant activation after purchase. Automatic conversion to your local currency at checkout.
pricing.anchor_us: One-time payment · Instant activation · 3 devices · No subscription
pricing.pro_tag: For individual streamers with OBS + 1-4 platforms.
pricing.pro_feat_3: 5 software: OBS, Streamlabs, vMix, PRISM, XSplit
pricing.plus_tag: For streamers who monetize and want combo triggers + multi-platform bridge.
pricing.fineprint_html: Automatic conversion to your currency · Final digital product · No refund after activation (policy) · 3 devices per license

faq.q1: How do I activate EsperantAI after purchase?
faq.a1: You buy Pro or Pro+, receive your license key by email in under 30 seconds, open the app, paste the key, and connect your streaming software. The guided activation takes you from purchase → key → stream without losing context.
faq.q2: What's the difference between Pro and Pro+?
faq.a2_p1_html: Pro includes everything an individual streamer needs: 5 software, 4 platforms (Twitch/YouTube/Kick/Trovo), 18 triggers, personalized calibration, hand gestures, all universal gestures.
faq.a2_p2_html: Pro+ adds 3 extra features: combo triggers (platform event + physical confirmation gesture, prevents false positives when receiving donations), StreamElements bridge (a single integration for Twitch + YouTube + Facebook), and unlimited triggers.
faq.q3: Does it work on Mac and Linux?
faq.a3: Yes. EsperantAI runs on any operating system with a modern browser (Chrome / Edge / Firefox). On Mac and Linux you use the web version. On Windows you can also use the local installer.
faq.q4: On how many devices can I use it?
faq.a4: A single license activates on up to 3 devices. If you lose one (PC change, reinstall), you can deactivate it from your panel and activate the new one.
faq.q5: Are my videos / camera sent to any server?
faq.a5: No. All facial detection processing runs 100% locally in your browser, using your GPU (Human.js + WebGL). Zero video / images leave your computer. The only external connection is the periodic validation of your license key against LemonSqueezy (~7 days between validations).
faq.a6: Not always. The license is validated online on activation and re-validated every 7 days. If you lose internet, EsperantAI keeps working for up to 7 days without reconnecting (grace period). After 7 days offline, it locks until you reconnect.
faq.q7: Do I need to buy any extra hardware?
faq.a7: No. EsperantAI works with the webcam you already have — your laptop's built-in camera or any USB 1080p webcam. The gesture input happens on your own face and hands, taking zero extra desk space. And it works even when your hands are busy with a controller, a guitar, a kitchen knife or a drawing pencil.
faq.q8: Is there a free version or trial?
faq.a8_p1_html: No. EsperantAI is sold only through its Pro and Pro+ plans. The reason: the product requires license activation to work against the validation backend, and activation is irreversible (see No-refund policy).
faq.a8_p2_html: If you want to see EsperantAI in action before buying, check out the demo videos on this same page and the user manual with real screenshots of the app.

footer.tagline: The first native gestural control category for streaming. Made in Aguascalientes, Mexico.
